name: mitsubishi-plc
documentation: ### 三菱plc封装

modules.name: mitsubishi_plc.exception
documentation: PLC exception base class.

classes.name: mitsubishi_plc.exception.PLCBaseException
documentation:
Base exception class for PLC-related errors.

This exception class inherits from FactoryStandBaseException and serves as
the base for all exceptions related to PLC operations.

classes.name: mitsubishi_plc.exception.PLCConnectError
documentation:
Exception raised for PLC Connect errors.

This exception is a subclass of PLCBaseException and is raised when there
is a Connect error during PLC operations.

classes.name: mitsubishi_plc.exception.PLCReadError
documentation:
Exception raised for PLC read errors.

This exception is a subclass of PLCBaseException and is raised when there
is an error related to reading data from the PLC.

classes.name: mitsubishi_plc.exception.PLCWriteError
documentation:
Exception raised for PLC write errors.

This exception is a subclass of PLCBaseException and is raised when there is
an error related to writing data to the PLC.

modules.name: mitsubishi_plc.mitsubishi_plc
documentation: 三菱PLC模块.

classes.name: mitsubishi_plc.mitsubishi_plc.MitsubishiPlc

methods.name: mitsubishi_plc.mitsubishi_plc.MitsubishiPlc.open_state
documentation:
Return the connection state of the PLC.

Returns:
    bool: True if the connection is open, False otherwise.

methods.name: mitsubishi_plc.mitsubishi_plc.MitsubishiPlc.communication_open
documentation:
Open the connection to the PLC.

Returns:
    bool: True if the connection is open, False otherwise.

Raises:
    PLCConnectError: If the connection is not open.

methods.name: mitsubishi_plc.mitsubishi_plc.MitsubishiPlc.communication_close
documentation: Close the connection to the PLC.

methods.name: mitsubishi_plc.mitsubishi_plc.MitsubishiPlc.execute_read
documentation:
Execute a read operation on the PLC.

Args:
    data_type (str): The data type to read.
    address (str): The address to read from.
    length (int): The length of the data to read.
    save_log (bool): Whether to save the log or not.

Returns:
    Union[str, int, float, bool, list]: The value read from the PLC.

methods.name: mitsubishi_plc.mitsubishi_plc.MitsubishiPlc.read_bool
documentation:
Read a boolean value from the PLC.

Args:
    address: The address to read from.
    length: The length of the data to read.
    save_log: Whether to save the log or not.

Returns:
    Union[bool, list]: The value read from the PLC.

methods.name: mitsubishi_plc.mitsubishi_plc.MitsubishiPlc.read_int16
documentation:
Read an integer value from the PLC.

Args:
    address: The address to read from.
    length: The length of the data to read.
    save_log: Whether to save the log or not.

Returns:
    Union[int, list]: The value read from the PLC.

methods.name: mitsubishi_plc.mitsubishi_plc.MitsubishiPlc.read_int32
documentation:
Read an 4 byte integer value from the PLC.

Args:
    address: The address to read from.
    length: The length of the data to read.
    save_log: Whether to save the log or not.

Returns:
    Union[int, list]: The value read from the PLC.

methods.name: mitsubishi_plc.mitsubishi_plc.MitsubishiPlc.read_float
documentation:
Read a float value from the PLC.

Args:
    address: The address to read from.
    length: The length of the data to read.
    save_log: Whether to save the log or not.

Returns:
    Union[float, list]: The value read from the PLC.

methods.name: mitsubishi_plc.mitsubishi_plc.MitsubishiPlc.read_double
documentation:
Read a double value from the PLC.

Args:
    address: The address to read from.
    length: The length of the data to read.
    save_log: Whether to save the log or not.

Returns:
    Union[float, list]: The value read from the PLC.

methods.name: mitsubishi_plc.mitsubishi_plc.MitsubishiPlc.read_str
documentation:
Read a string value from the PLC.

Args:
    address: The address to read from.
    length: The length of the string to read.
    save_log: Whether to save the log or not.

Returns:
    Union[str, list]: The value read from the PLC.

methods.name: mitsubishi_plc.mitsubishi_plc.MitsubishiPlc.execute_write
documentation:
Execute a write operation on the PLC.

Args:
    data_type (str): The data type to write.
    address (str): The address to write to.
    value (Union[str, int, float, bool]): The value to write.
    save_log (bool): Whether to save the log or not.

Returns:
    bool: True if the wrote was successful, False otherwise.

methods.name: mitsubishi_plc.mitsubishi_plc.MitsubishiPlc.write_bool
documentation:
Write a boolean value to the PLC.

Args:
    address: The address to write to.
    value: The value to write.
    save_log: Whether to save the log or not.

Returns:
    bool: True if the wrote was successful, False otherwise.

methods.name: mitsubishi_plc.mitsubishi_plc.MitsubishiPlc.write_int16
documentation:
Write an integer value to the PLC.

Args:
    address: The address to write to.
    value: The value to write.
    save_log: Whether to save the log or not.

Returns:
    int: The number of bytes written.

methods.name: mitsubishi_plc.mitsubishi_plc.MitsubishiPlc.write_float
documentation:
Write a float value to the PLC.

Args:
    address: The address to write to.
    value: The value to write.
    save_log: Whether to save the log or not.

Returns:
    int: The number of bytes written.

methods.name: mitsubishi_plc.mitsubishi_plc.MitsubishiPlc.write_double
documentation:
Write a double value to the PLC.

Args:
    address: The address to write to.
    value: The value to write.
    save_log: Whether to save the log or not.

Returns:
    int: The number of bytes written.

methods.name: mitsubishi_plc.mitsubishi_plc.MitsubishiPlc.write_str
documentation:
Write a string value to the PLC.

Args:
    address: The address to write to.
    value: The value to write.
    save_log: Whether to save the log or not.

Returns:
    int: The number of bytes written.
MitsubishiPlc class.
